div.p: Shape: [batch, tgt_len, d_model] Target sequence embeddings with positional encoding
Shape: [batch, tgt_len, d_model] To next decoder layer or output projection

ul.li: Post-LN: LayerNorm(x + sublayer(x)) Modern models use Pre-LN for training stability.

div.p: Q, K, V from decoder input Causal mask prevents attending to future positions Mask: [1, 1, tgt_len, tgt_len]
Q from decoder, K/V from encoder Decoder queries encoder representation Shape: [batch, tgt_len, d_model]
Position-wise transformation W2(GELU(W1(x) + b1)) + b2 Expansion: d_model → 4*d_model → d_model
